category_sources: Official GitHub README says LIBNFS is a client library for accessing NFS shares over a network.
source_facts.description: C client library for NFS
docs_sources: Official README documents libnfs APIs, build, platform support, and says sources ship prebuilt manpages in doc.
Official repository contains the doc directory referenced by README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/sahlberg/libnfs; per instruction repo is returned as null when source_facts.repo is present.
tags_sources: Official README describes RAW, asynchronous NFS, and synchronous NFS APIs for network shares.
source_facts.description identifies a C client library for NFS.
